name: POSTGRES | Configuration Check v1
description: Survey vars for postgres_configuration_check playbook. All fields optional -- defaults apply.

spec.question_description: Port PostgreSQL is listening on. Used to locate the unix socket (.s.PGSQL.<port>). Must match the installed instance.
true = apply fixes automatically for all remediable checks. false = check-only, no changes made.
true = restart PostgreSQL if a parameter change requires it. false = skip restart (changes staged but not active until manual restart).
true = generate and fetch HTML config check report to the controller under reports/.
